reference: Hello Doctor, I am thirty-seven years old and my height is five feet. I have some regular problems such as my stool not being clear, which causes me to have gas problems. I experience headaches now and then, typically starting from the left side. I also have leg pain with swelling, with more pain from the ankle to the toe.
text: Hello, doctor, I am 37 years old and my height is 5 feet. I have some regular problems such as my stool not being clear, which causes me to have gas problems. I experience headaches now and then, typically starting from the left side. I also have leg pain with swelling, with more pain from the ankle to the toe.
